# CWE-360 vulnerable — Trust of System Event Data
lang: go
file: CWE-360-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
)

type GinCtx struct {
	Request *http.Request
}

type GormDB struct{}

func (db *GormDB) Exec(query string, args ...interface{}) error { return nil }

func BanClientIP(c *GinCtx, db *GormDB) error {
	clientIP := c.Request.Header.Get("X-Forwarded-For")
	return db.Exec("INSERT INTO ip_bans (ip) VALUES (?)", clientIP)
}
